description: Evals for S4 dv-env-setup — tests environment generation correctness, Makefile completeness, and UVM skeleton quality

evals.name: APB UART — full setup from S1 JSON
evals.description: Generate complete DV environment for APB UART using existing S1 spec JSON. Tests that Makefile has all targets, UVM skeletons are correct, paths are consistent.

with_skill.prompt: Run /dv-env-setup for a project called apb_uart. PROJECT_ROOT is /tmp/apb_uart_dv_test. Use these tool paths: VCS_HOME=/tools/synopsys/vcs/T-2022.06, VERDI_HOME=/tools/synopsys/verdi/T-2022.06, UVM_HOME=/tools/uvm/uvm-1.2/src, UVM_VERSION=1.2, LICENSE_SERVER=7280@licserver. Timescale: 1ns/1ps, default timeout: 10ms. Regression tests: [sanity, apb_reg_write_test, apb_reg_read_test]. Seeds: [1,2,3]. Do NOT ask any clarifying questions — use these values directly and generate all files.
grading_criteria: Makefile created at /tmp/apb_uart_dv_test/dv/sim/Makefile

Makefile contains all required targets: compile_rtl, compile_tb, elab, compile, sim, run, regress, cov_merge, cov_report, verdi, clean_logs, clean_run, clean_cov, clean_build, clean, show_config, help
Makefile BUILD_DIR is separate from RUN_DIR (shared build pattern)
Makefile has WAVES ?= 0, COV ?= 0, LOG ?= 1, PLUSARGS, VPLUSARGS, DEFINES, SIM_OPTS, COMP_OPTS variables
Makefile sim target checks for missing simv and errors with helpful message
compile.f references UVM_HOME/src/uvm_pkg.sv
compile.f references apb_uart_env_pkg.sv before other TB files
synopsys_sim.setup created with WORK > DEFAULT mapping
waves.tcl created with fsdbDumpfile and fsdbDumpvars
regression.sh created and references the 3 tests across 3 seeds (9 runs)
proj.cshrc created with setenv for all required variables
proj.bashrc created with export for all required variables
All 10 UVM skeleton files created: tb_top, if, env_pkg, env_cfg, scoreboard, coverage, env, base_seq, base_test, sanity_test
UVM skeleton files use correct project prefix apb_uart_
dv_env_data.json written with correct schema including directory_structure, key_files, tb_skeleton_files, env_vars

without_skill.prompt: Set up a complete UVM DV environment for an APB UART project. PROJECT_ROOT=/tmp/apb_uart_dv_test. VCS_HOME=/tools/synopsys/vcs/T-2022.06, VERDI_HOME=/tools/synopsys/verdi/T-2022.06, UVM_HOME=/tools/uvm/uvm-1.2/src, LICENSE_SERVER=7280@licserver. Create: Makefile, compile.f, rtl.f, synopsys_sim.setup, waves.tcl, regression.sh, proj.cshrc, proj.bashrc, and UVM skeleton files (env, scoreboard, coverage, tb_top, sequences, tests). Tests for regression: sanity, apb_reg_write_test, apb_reg_read_test. Seeds: 1, 2, 3.

evals.name: AXI DMA — new project no prior outputs
evals.description: Generate environment for complex AXI DMA with CDC (dual clock) from scratch — no S1/S2/S3 inputs. Tests interactive flow and correct multi-clock handling in TB skeleton.

with_skill.prompt: Run /dv-env-setup for project axi_dma. PROJECT_ROOT=/tmp/axi_dma_dv. VCS_HOME=/tools/vcs/latest, VERDI_HOME=/tools/verdi/latest, UVM_HOME=/tools/uvm/1.2, UVM_VERSION=1.2, LICENSE_SERVER=5280@dvlic. The DUT has two clock domains: clk_200mhz (AXI master) and clk_100mhz (AXI-Lite slave). Timescale: 1ns/1ps, timeout: 5ms. Extra compile flag: -xlrm. Coverage types: line+cond+branch+tgl+fsm. Regression tests: [sanity, dma_single_chan_test, dma_multi_chan_test]. Seeds: [1,2,3,4,5]. Generate all files without asking any clarifying questions.
grading_criteria: Makefile created with all required targets
Makefile TIMESCALE ?= 1ns/1ps used in VLOGAN_RTL_FLAGS and VLOGAN_TB_FLAGS
Makefile extra_compile_flags -xlrm included in VCS_COMMON_FLAGS
TB top (axi_dma_tb_top.sv) generated with comments for TWO clock generators (clk_200mhz and clk_100mhz)
All UVM skeleton files use axi_dma_ prefix
regression.sh runs 3 tests × 5 seeds = 15 total runs
synopsys_sim.setup references ./build/AN.DB as WORK library
compile.f has correct +incdir+ paths
proj.cshrc and proj.bashrc both set VCS_HOME, VERDI_HOME, UVM_HOME
dv_env_data.json has correct directory_structure with all required keys

without_skill.prompt: Create a UVM DV simulation environment for an AXI DMA project with two clock domains (200MHz AXI master, 100MHz AXI-Lite slave). PROJECT_ROOT=/tmp/axi_dma_dv. VCS tools. Create Makefile with all standard DV targets, UVM testbench skeleton files, compilation scripts, and environment setup.

evals.name: Makefile switch correctness — all options
evals.description: Validates that the Makefile correctly implements all conditional flags: WAVES=1 adds UCLi/FSDB, COV=1 adds coverage, LOG=0 disables log. Tests the shared BUILD_DIR pattern.

with_skill.prompt: Run /dv-env-setup for project i2c_master. PROJECT_ROOT=/tmp/i2c_master_dv. VCS_HOME=/tools/vcs, VERDI_HOME=/tools/verdi, UVM_HOME=/tools/uvm, LICENSE_SERVER=1234@lic. Coverage types: line+cond+branch+tgl+fsm. Generate all files. After generating, show me exactly what flags will be passed to simv when I run: (A) make sim TEST=sanity SEED=1 WAVES=1 COV=1 LOG=1, (B) make sim TEST=sanity SEED=1 (all defaults), (C) make sim TEST=err_test SEED=42 WAVES=0 COV=1 PLUSARGS='+inject_err' DEFINES='+define+DEBUG'
grading_criteria: Case A WAVES=1: simv flags include -ucli -do waves.tcl +fsdb+delta +vcs+vcdpluson
Case A COV=1: simv flags include -cm line+cond+branch+tgl+fsm -cm_dir <COV_DIR>
Case A LOG=1: simv flags include -l <RUN_DIR>/simv.log
Case A UVM: flags include +UVM_TESTNAME=sanity +ntb_random_seed=1
Case B defaults: NO -ucli, NO -cm, HAS -l simv.log (LOG=1 default)
Case C PLUSARGS: +inject_err present in sim flags
Case C DEFINES: +define+DEBUG appears in compile flags (VLOGAN_RTL_FLAGS/VLOGAN_TB_FLAGS)
BUILD_DIR is /tmp/i2c_master_dv/dv/sim/build — same for all cases
RUN_DIR for case A is /tmp/i2c_master_dv/dv/sim/run/sanity_1
RUN_DIR for case C is /tmp/i2c_master_dv/dv/sim/run/err_test_42
make help lists all targets and all options with examples

without_skill.prompt: Create a VCS Makefile for an I2C master DV project at /tmp/i2c_master_dv. The Makefile should support WAVES, COV, LOG switches, PLUSARGS, VPLUSARGS, DEFINES, TEST and SEED variables. Show what simulation command gets generated for: (A) WAVES=1 COV=1 LOG=1, (B) defaults only, (C) PLUSARGS='+inject_err' DEFINES='+define+DEBUG'.
